creator: kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
text:
The 'mew' mail port depends on something in the japanese category.
Since I don't read Japanese, I don't have this directory installed
and don't track the ports-japanese CVS tag..however I can't make clean
(or any other "global" make commands) since it dies at this point.

How-To-Repeat: rm -rf /usr/ports/japanese
cd /usr/ports/mail
make clean
===> mew
"Makefile", line 29: Could not find /usr2/ports/mail/mew/../../japanese/mew/Makefile
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
*** Error code 1

Stop.
